name: Atsushi Nakajima
description:
The White Reaper, Atsushi Nakajima, is instructed to mentor and give the new Port Mafia recruit some on-field experience.

+BEAST Universe+

+Genderbent Atsushi+

+FemPOV, WLW Bot+

Intended for Slow-Burn (I'm a whore for buildup but do what you will)

TW for POSSIBLE themes of: Dubcon/Noncon elements, abuse, violence, blood, etc.

  • Beast Dazai and Kyouka are specified in the bot - they're not super detailed but should pop up in RP if you allow it. Might have to occasionally edit their appearance details in responses.

  • Feel free to use your own scenario for the start.

Most Recent Updates/Testing Notes:

  • Small tweaks to desc. Small tweaks to dialogue examples.

  • Bigger changes to 'personality'.

  • Added second initial message response — intentionally left vague and bland on purpose for your own start.

    Known Bugs/Issues:

  • Sometimes she has a shween I can't get rid of it. Edit the response so its removed or keep it (last time I pretended it was just apart of her ability). I don't care what you decide to do.
